entry.title: AI Tour New York City: Go inside the excitement at the Microsoft AI Tour

media:group.media:title: AI Tour New York City: Go inside the excitement at the Microsoft AI Tour
media:group.media:description:
Experience the energy of The Microsoft AI Tour stop in New York City.​
Watch highlights from the “Frontier Transformation” keynote with Chief Marketing Officer, Commercial Cloud & AI, Alysa Taylor, along with activations across the event—from moments inside the Connection Hub to snapshots of AI in action at the Security AI Agent threat simulator and the Copilot Challenge.​
See real applications of AI at Frontier Street featuring brands like Levi’s, the Premier League, and Kraft‑Heinz, plus crowd‑favorite areas like the Giant Surface and the GitHub Zone.​
Empower your business at the #MicrosoftAITour. ​
Find your city: https://aitour.microsoft.com/flow/microsoft/aitour/landing/page/home?wt.mc_ID=AITourFY26-Tier1_gmee_corp_scl_oo_youtube_MSEvents_NYC_Sizzle
